title: TIME-DOMAIN ANALYSIS OF CONTINUOUS-TIME SYSTEMS
summary: This page presents MATLAB Program CH2MP4, which graphically demonstrates the convolution process by plotting h(τ), x(t−τ), and their product while numerically approximating the convolution integral. The accompanying text explains how the gray shaded overlap region corresponds to y(t), describes the changing limits of integration in several figures, and comments on MATLAB commands such as figure, subplot, patch, get, set, and drawnow.
